la: Translatio sancti Martini, Episcopi et Confessoris; et Dedicatio Basilicae suae hoc ipso die, quo etiam is ante aliquot annos Episcopum fuerat ordinatus
en: The Translation of Saint Martin, Bishop and Confessor; and the Dedication of His Basilica on the same day on Which He Had Also Been Ordained Bishop Several Years Earlier
pl: Przeniesienie świętego Marcina, Biskupa i Wyznawcy; i Poświęcenie jego Bazyliki tego samego dnia, w którym kilka lat wcześniej przyjął on święcenia biskupie
